title: Yards and Setbacks
summary: Establishes minimum front, side, and rear yard requirements for lots in residential and other zones, including how yards are measured and encroachments that are permitted.
tags: setback yard zoning residential front side rear

title: R1 One-Family Zone Yard Standards
summary: Specifies the front yard, side yard, and rear yard minimums for the R1 One-Family Dwelling Zone, generally including a 15 ft front yard and rear yard requirements.
tags: r1 setback front yard single-family residential zoning

title: Height of Buildings and Structures
summary: Sets maximum building height and number of stories by zone and height district, and describes how height is measured and permitted rooftop projections.
tags: height stories zoning height-district envelope

title: Residential Floor Area and Lot Coverage
summary: Limits residential floor area ratio (RFA) and maximum lot coverage for single-family and low-density residential zones to control bulk and massing.
tags: floor area ratio far lot coverage bulk massing residential

title: Accessory Dwelling Units (ADU)
summary: Establishes development standards for accessory dwelling units and junior ADUs, including size limits, setbacks, parking exemptions, and ministerial approval consistent with state ADU law.
tags: adu accessory dwelling unit jadu setback parking ministerial

title: Transit Oriented Communities (TOC) Incentive Program
summary: Provides density bonus and development incentives (increased FAR, reduced parking, reduced setbacks) for projects near major transit stops that include affordable housing, scaled by TOC tier.
tags: toc density bonus affordable transit tier incentive parking

title: Density Bonus for Affordable Housing
summary: Implements the State Density Bonus Law allowing additional dwelling units and development concessions in exchange for restricted affordable units.
tags: density bonus affordable housing concession incentive units

title: Automobile Parking Requirements
summary: Sets minimum off-street automobile parking based on use, floor area, and number of dwelling units, and describes parking dimensions and access.
tags: parking off-street spaces requirement zoning use

title: Elimination of Parking Minimums Near Transit
summary: Prohibits public agencies from imposing minimum automobile parking requirements on development located within one-half mile of major transit stops.
tags: ab2097 parking transit minimum elimination state

title: Hillside Area Development Standards
summary: Applies special standards to designated Hillside Areas, including grading limits, retaining wall standards, access, and slope-based floor area reductions.
tags: hillside grading slope retaining access floor area

title: Grading, Excavation and Fills
summary: Regulates grading permits, cut and fill quantities, drainage, erosion control, and the requirement for a soils/geology report on hillside and expansive soil sites.
tags: grading excavation fill soils geology drainage hillside permit

title: Very High Fire Hazard Severity Zone Requirements
summary: Imposes fire-resistive construction, ignition-resistant materials, ember-resistant venting, and defensible space/brush clearance for structures in Very High Fire Hazard Severity Zones.
tags: fire vhfhsz brush clearance defensible space ignition-resistant wui

title: Methane Seepage Regulations
summary: Requires methane mitigation systems (membranes, venting, gas detection) for buildings located in designated Methane Zones and Methane Buffer Zones.
tags: methane mitigation membrane venting gas hazard zone

title: Coastal Development Permit
summary: Requires a Coastal Development Permit for most development within the Coastal Zone, subject to local coastal program and California Coastal Commission review.
tags: coastal development permit cdp coastal-zone commission lcp

title: Historic Preservation Overlay Zone (HPOZ)
summary: Establishes review procedures and design standards for exterior alterations, additions, new construction, and demolition of contributing structures within an HPOZ.
tags: hpoz historic preservation overlay design review certificate appropriateness

title: Commercial Zone Use Regulations
summary: Defines permitted and conditional uses and development standards in commercial zones, governing use classification and change of use.
tags: commercial use classification zoning change-of-use conditional

title: Accessible Routes
summary: Requires at least one accessible route connecting site arrival points, accessible parking, entrances, and all accessible elements and spaces within a building or site.
tags: accessibility accessible route path-of-travel cbc 11b ada entrance

title: Accessible Toilet and Bathing Facilities
summary: Requires accessible restrooms and bathing facilities with compliant fixtures, clearances, grab bars, and signage where such facilities are provided.
tags: accessibility restroom toilet bathroom grab-bar cbc 11b ada

title: Accessible Parking Spaces
summary: Establishes the number, dimensions, van-accessible ratio, access aisles, and signage for accessible parking spaces based on total parking provided.
tags: accessibility accessible parking van access-aisle cbc 11b ada

title: ADA Title III Public Accommodations
summary: Requires places of public accommodation and commercial facilities to be readily accessible to and usable by individuals with disabilities.
tags: ada federal title-iii public accommodation accessibility barrier

title: CALGreen Residential Mandatory Measures
summary: Sets mandatory green building measures for residential construction including water efficiency, construction waste diversion, EV charging readiness, and indoor air quality.
tags: calgreen green title24 part11 residential ev water waste

title: CALGreen Nonresidential Mandatory Measures
summary: Sets mandatory green building measures for nonresidential construction including energy efficiency, water use reduction, EV infrastructure, and material pollution control.
tags: calgreen green title24 part11 nonresidential commercial ev energy

title: Building Energy Efficiency Standards
summary: Establishes the California energy code governing building envelope, HVAC, lighting, and renewable requirements, documented through Title 24 energy compliance forms.
tags: title24 energy part6 hvac envelope lighting solar compliance

title: Construction Type and Allowable Area
summary: Regulates allowable building height and area based on construction type and occupancy classification, including area increases for frontage and sprinklers.
tags: construction-type allowable-area occupancy cbc chapter5 sprinkler height

title: Occupancy Separation and Fire-Resistance
summary: Requires fire-resistance-rated separations between different occupancy groups and specifies mixed-use separation and nonseparated occupancy provisions.
tags: occupancy separation fire-resistance mixed-use rated assembly cbc

title: Occupancy Group Classification
summary: Requires every building or portion thereof to be classified into an occupancy group that determines applicable building, egress, and life-safety requirements.
tags: occupancy group classification building egress life-safety use

title: Plan Review and Permit Submittal
summary: Describes plan check submittal requirements, the review process, and the documents that must accompany a building permit application.
tags: plan-check permit submittal review documents ladbs building

title: Structural Design and Seismic Requirements
summary: Adopts structural design and earthquake load provisions requiring structural calculations and plans for new construction and significant additions.
tags: structural seismic earthquake design calculations loads foundation

title: Sign Regulations - Area and Type
summary: Regulates on-site sign area, height, illumination, and type by zone, and prohibits certain off-site and digital signs except in designated sign districts.
tags: sign signage area height illumination billboard sign-district zoning

title: Electric Vehicle Charging Infrastructure
summary: Requires EV-capable, EV-ready, and EV charging station provisions for new residential and nonresidential parking facilities consistent with the green code.
tags: ev electric vehicle charging evse parking green infrastructure

title: Conditional Use Permits and Discretionary Actions
summary: Establishes procedures for conditional use permits and other discretionary entitlements required for certain uses, intensities, and deviations from code.
tags: conditional use permit cup entitlement discretionary zoning approval

title: Coastal Zone Overlay Standards (New Zoning Code)
summary: Applies coastal overlay development standards from the new LA zoning code (Chapter 1A) governing height, bulk, and public access within the Coastal Zone.
tags: coastal overlay chapter1a new-zoning-code height public-access
